properties.name: jwt.secret
properties.description: Secret key used to sign JWT tokens

properties.name: jwt.expiration
properties.description: JWT token expiration time in milliseconds

properties.name: jwt.refresh.expiration
properties.description: JWT refresh token expiration time in milliseconds

properties.name: brevo.api.key
properties.description: Brevo (Sendinblue) API key for email service

properties.name: brevo.sender.email
properties.description: Sender email address for Brevo emails

properties.name: brevo.sender.name
properties.description: Sender display name for Brevo emails

properties.name: cors.allowed-origins
properties.description: Comma-separated list of allowed CORS origins

properties.name: playmate.msg.encryption-key
properties.description: Base64-encoded 256-bit AES key for message encryption at rest (AES-256-GCM)

properties.name: internal.cleanup.key
properties.description: Secret key for triggering internal cleanup via REST endpoint
